name: Broiled Cheddar-Olive
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Ripe Olives, Pitted and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard cook the eggs and slice them into a medium-sized bowl.
2. Grate the cheddar and add it to the bowl with the eggs.
3. Add the chopped olives, green bell pepper, and onion to the mixture.
4. In a small cup or bowl, blend together the catsup, mayonnaise, prepared mustard, marjoram, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix in the blended ingredients with the cheese and vegetable mixture.
6. Preheat the oven to broil.
7. Split the sandwich buns (if not already split) using a sharp knife.
8. Place the buns on the broiler rack, cut sides up, about 2 inches from the heat source.
9. Broil until the buns are golden brown and remove them from the oven.
10. Spread butter on each bun.
11. Spoon about 1/8 of the cheese mixture onto a buttered side of each bun.
12. Return the sandwiches to the broiler, placing the tops of the sandwiches about 3 inches from the heat source.
13. Broil until the cheddar is bubbly and serve immediately from the oven.
